# solution.py

"""
Multi-Agent Quest Creator
A collaborative system for multiple RPG players to design, balance, and share quests.
"""

import uuid
import copy
import time
import random
import statistics
from enum import Enum
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any, Tuple
from datetime import datetime


# --- Enums and Constants ---

class QuestType(Enum):
    COMBAT = "combat"
    PUZZLE = "puzzle"
    EXPLORATION = "exploration"
    HYBRID = "hybrid"


class Difficulty(Enum):
    TRIVIAL = 1
    EASY = 2
    MEDIUM = 3
    HARD = 4
    EXTREME = 5


class EnemyType(Enum):
    MINION = "minion"
    ELITE = "elite"
    BOSS = "boss"
    SWARM = "swarm"


class RewardType(Enum):
    GOLD = "gold"
    ITEM = "item"
    EXPERIENCE = "experience"
    SKILL_POINT = "skill_point"
    UNIQUE = "unique"


class PlayerRole(Enum):
    DESIGNER = "designer"
    BALANCER = "balancer"
    TESTER = "tester"
    REVIEWER = "reviewer"


# --- Data Models ---

@dataclass
class Enemy:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    enemy_type: EnemyType = EnemyType.MINION
    health: int = 100
    attack: int = 10
    defense: int = 5
    special_abilities: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    level: int = 1

    def power_rating(self) -> float:
        base = self.health * 0.3 + self.attack * 2.0 + self.defense * 1.5
        ability_bonus = len(self.special_abilities) * 10
        type_multiplier = {
            EnemyType.MINION: 1.0,
            EnemyType.ELITE: 1.8,
            EnemyType.BOSS: 3.0,
            EnemyType.SWARM: 0.6,
        }
        return (base + ability_bonus) * type_multiplier[self.enemy_type] * (1 + self.level * 0.1)


@dataclass
class Reward:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    reward_type: RewardType = RewardType.GOLD
    value: int = 0
    rarity: int = 1  # 1-5
    description: str = ""

    def worth_rating(self) -> float:
        return self.value * self.rarity * 0.5


@dataclass
class Objective:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    description: str = ""
    required: bool = True
    difficulty_contribution: float = 1.0
    completion_criteria: str = ""
    order: int = 0


@dataclass
class NPC:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    role: str = "quest_giver"
    dialogue: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    created_by: str = ""


@dataclass
class CustomItem:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    stats: Dict[str, int] = field(default_factory=dict)
    created_by: str = ""


@dataclass
class PlayerSkills:
    combat: int = 5
    puzzle_solving: int = 5
    exploration: int = 5
    teamwork: int = 5
    level: int = 1

    def average_skill(self) -> float:
        return statistics.mean([self.combat, self.puzzle_solving, self.exploration, self.teamwork])


@dataclass
class Player:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    username: str = ""
    password_hash: str = ""
    role: PlayerRole = PlayerRole.DESIGNER
    skills: PlayerSkills = field(default_factory=PlayerSkills)
    logged_in: bool = False
    session_token: str = ""
    created_quests: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    preferences: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class QuestVersion:
    version_number: int = 0
    timestamp: str = ""
    modified_by: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    snapshot: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class SimulationResult:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    quest_id: str = ""
    timestamp: str = ""
    participants: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    success: bool = False
    completion_time: float = 0.0
    difficulty_perceived: float = 0.0
    player_deaths: int = 0
    enemies_defeated: int = 0
    objectives_completed: int = 0
    total_objectives: int = 0
    rewards_earned: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    feedback: str = ""
    balance_score: float = 0.0


@dataclass
class Review:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    quest_id: str = ""
    reviewer_id: str = ""
    rating: int = 0  # 1-5
    comment: str = ""
    timestamp: str = ""


@dataclass
class Quest:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    title: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    quest_type: QuestType = QuestType.COMBAT
    difficulty: Difficulty = Difficulty.MEDIUM
    objectives: List[Objective] = field(default_factory=list)
    enemies: List[Enemy] = field(default_factory=list)
    rewards: List[Reward] = field(default_factory=list)
    npcs: List[NPC] = field(default_factory=list)
    custom_items: List[CustomItem] = field(default_factory=list)
    min_players: int = 1
    max_players: int = 4
    recommended_level: int = 1
    created_by: str = ""
    collaborators: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    published: bool = False
    version_history: List[QuestVersion] = field(default_factory=list)
    current_version: int = 0
    reviews: List[Review] = field(default_factory=list)
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    created_at: str = ""
    updated_at: str = ""


# --- Balance Engine ---

class BalanceEngine:
    """Analyzes quest balance and provides real-time feedback and suggestions."""

    IDEAL_BALANCE_RANGE = (0.7, 1.3)
    DIFFICULTY_MULTIPLIERS = {
        Difficulty.TRIVIAL: 0.5,
        Difficulty.EASY: 0.75,
        Difficulty.MEDIUM: 1.0,
        Difficulty.HARD: 1.5,
        Difficulty.EXTREME: 2.5,
    }

    def analyze_balance(self, quest: Quest, player_skills: List[PlayerSkills]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Perform comprehensive balance analysis on a quest."""
        enemy_power = self._calculate_total_enemy_power(quest)
        player_power = self._calculate_total_player_power(player_skills)
        reward_value = self._calculate_total_reward_value(quest)
        objective_weight = self._calculate_objective_weight(quest)

        difficulty_mult = self.DIFFICULTY_MULTIPLIERS[quest.difficulty]
        adjusted_enemy_power = enemy_power * difficulty_mult

        balance_ratio = adjusted_enemy_power / max(player_power, 1)
        reward_ratio = reward_value / max(adjusted_enemy_power * 0.1, 1)

        is_balanced = self.IDEAL_BALANCE_RANGE[0] <= balance_ratio <= self.IDEAL_BALANCE_RANGE[1]

        return {
            "balance_ratio": round(balance_ratio, 3),
            "reward_ratio": round(reward_ratio, 3),
            "is_balanced": is_balanced,
            "enemy_power_total": round(enemy_power, 1),
            "player_power_total": round(player_power, 1),
            "reward_value_total": round(reward_value, 1),
            "objective_weight": round(objective_weight, 2),
            "difficulty_multiplier": difficulty_mult,
            "verdict": self._get_verdict(balance_ratio),
            "suggestions": self._generate_suggestions(balance_ratio, reward_ratio, quest, player_skills),
        }

    def _calculate_total_enemy_power(self, quest: Quest) -> float:
        return sum(e.power_rating() for e in quest.enemies)

    def _calculate_total_player_power(self, player_skills: List[PlayerSkills]) -> float:
        if not player_skills:
            return 50.0
        return sum(ps.average_skill() * 10 * (1 + ps.level * 0.15) for ps in player_skills)

    def _calculate_total_reward_value(self, quest: Quest) -> float:
        return sum(r.worth_rating() for r in quest.rewards)

    def _calculate_objective_weight(self, quest: Quest) -> float:
        if not quest.objectives:
            return 0.0
        return sum(o.difficulty_contribution for o in quest.objectives if o.required)

    def _get_verdict(self, balance_ratio: float) -> str:
        if balance_ratio < 0.4:
            return "TOO_EASY"
        elif balance_ratio < 0.7:
            return "SLIGHTLY_EASY"
        elif balance_ratio <= 1.3:
            return "BALANCED"
        elif balance_ratio <= 2.0:
            return "SLIGHTLY_HARD"
        else:
            return "TOO_HARD"

    def _generate_suggestions(
        self, balance_ratio: float, reward_ratio: float,
        quest: Quest, player_skills: List[PlayerSkills]
    ) -> List[str]:
        suggestions = []

        if balance_ratio < 0.7:
            suggestions.append("Consider adding more enemies or increasing enemy stats to raise difficulty.")
            if quest.enemies:
                suggestions.append("Upgrade some minions to elite enemies for a more engaging challenge.")
            suggestions.append(f"Add {max(1, int((0.7 - balance_ratio) * 5))} more enemies to reach balance.")
        elif balance_ratio > 1.3:
            suggestions.append("Reduce enemy count or stats to lower difficulty.")
            suggestions.append("Consider adding more rewards to compensate for high difficulty.")
            if len(quest.enemies) > 3:
                suggestions.append(f"Remove {max(1, int((balance_ratio - 1.3) * 3))} enemies to approach balance.")

        if reward_ratio < 0.5:
            suggestions.append("Rewards seem low for the quest difficulty. Consider increasing reward values.")
        elif reward_ratio > 3.0:
            suggestions.append("Rewards may be too generous. Consider reducing reward values or rarity.")

        if quest.quest_type == QuestType.COMBAT and not quest.enemies:
            suggestions.append("Combat quest has no enemies defined. Add at least one enemy encounter.")
        if quest.quest_type == QuestType.PUZZLE and not quest.objectives:
            suggestions.append("Puzzle quest needs objectives. Add puzzle-solving objectives.")
        if not quest.objectives:
            suggestions.append("Quest has no objectives. Define at least one clear objective.")
        if not quest.rewards:
            suggestions.append("No rewards defined. Players need incentives to complete the quest.")

        if player_skills:
            avg_level = statistics.mean([ps.level for ps in player_skills])
            if quest.recommended_level > avg_level + 3:
                suggestions.append(
                    f"Recommended level ({quest.recommended_level}) is much higher than "
                    f"average player level ({avg_level:.0f}). Consider lowering it."
                )

        return suggestions

    def suggest_adjustments(self, quest: Quest, player_preferences: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Suggest modifications based on player preferences and feedback."""
        adjustments = []

        preferred_difficulty = player_preferences.get("preferred_difficulty")
        if preferred_difficulty and preferred_difficulty != quest.difficulty.value:
            adjustments.append({
                "type": "difficulty",
                "current": quest.difficulty.value,
                "suggested": preferred_difficulty,
                "reason": "Aligns with player preference",
            })

        preferred_enemy_count = player_preferences.get("preferred_enemy_count")
        if preferred_enemy_count is not None:
            current_count = len(quest.enemies)
            if abs(current_count - preferred_enemy_count) > 1:
                adjustments.append({
                    "type": "enemy_count",
                    "current": current_count,
                    "suggested": preferred_enemy_count,
                    "reason": "Player prefers different encounter density",
                })

        preferred_reward_level = player_preferences.get("preferred_reward_level")
        if preferred_reward_level == "higher":
            adjustments.append({
                "type": "rewards",
                "action": "increase",
                "suggested_multiplier": 1.5,
                "reason": "Players feel rewards are insufficient",
            })
        elif preferred_reward_level == "lower":
            adjustments.append({
                "type": "rewards",
                "action": "decrease",
                "suggested_multiplier": 0.7,
                "reason": "Players feel rewards are too generous",
            })

        preferred_types = player_preferences.get("preferred_enemy_types", [])
        if preferred_types:
            current_types = {e.enemy_type.value for e in quest.enemies}
            missing = set(preferred_types) - current_types
            if missing:
                adjustments.append({
                    "type": "enemy_types",
                    "action": "add_variety",
                    "missing_types": list(missing),
                    "reason": "Players prefer more enemy variety",
                })

        return adjustments


# --- History Manager ---

class HistoryManager:
    """Tracks all changes to quests and supports version revert."""

    def save_version(self, quest: Quest, modified_by: str, description: str = "") -> QuestVersion:
        """Save current quest state as a new version."""
        version = QuestVersion(
            version_number=quest.current_version + 1,
            timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
            modified_by=modified_by,
            description=description or f"Version {quest.current_version + 1}",
            snapshot=self._serialize_quest(quest),
        )
        quest.version_history.append(version)
        quest.current_version = version.version_number
        quest.updated_at = version.timestamp
        return version

    def revert_to_version(self, quest: Quest, version_number: int) -> Optional[Quest]:
        """Revert quest to a specific version."""
        for version in quest.version_history:
            if version.version_number == version_number:
                restored = self._deserialize_quest(version.snapshot)
                restored.version_history = quest.version_history
                restored.current_version = quest.current_version
                restored.collaborators = quest.collaborators
                restored.created_by = quest.created_by
                restored.reviews = quest.reviews
                restored.published = quest.published
                restored.created_at = quest.created_at
                return restored
        return None

    def get_history(self, quest: Quest) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get change history for a quest."""
        return [
            {
                "version": v.version_number,
                "timestamp": v.timestamp,
                "modified_by": v.modified_by,
                "description": v.description,
            }
            for v in quest.version_history
        ]

    def get_diff(self, quest: Quest, version_a: int, version_b: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get differences between two versions."""
        snap_a = snap_b = None
        for v in quest.version_history:
            if v.version_number == version_a:
                snap_a = v.snapshot
            if v.version_number == version_b:
                snap_b = v.snapshot
        if snap_a is None or snap_b is None:
            return {"error": "Version not found"}

        changes = {}
        all_keys = set(snap_a.keys()) | set(snap_b.keys())
        for key in all_keys:
            val_a = snap_a.get(key)
            val_b = snap_b.get(key)
            if val_a != val_b:
                changes[key] = {"from": val_a, "to": val_b}
        return changes

    def _serialize_quest(self, quest: Quest) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "id": quest.id,
            "title": quest.title,
            "description": quest.description,
            "quest_type": quest.quest_type.value,
            "difficulty": quest.difficulty.value,
            "objectives_count": len(quest.objectives),
            "enemies_count": len(quest.enemies),
            "rewards_count": len(quest.rewards),
            "npcs_count": len(quest.npcs),
            "min_players": quest.min_players,
            "max_players": quest.max_players,
            "recommended_level": quest.recommended_level,
            "objectives": [{"desc": o.description, "required": o.required} for o in quest.objectives],
            "enemies": [{"name": e.name, "type": e.enemy_type.value, "hp": e.health} for e in quest.enemies],
            "rewards": [{"name": r.name, "type": r.reward_type.value, "value": r.value} for r in quest.rewards],
            "tags": list(quest.tags),
        }

    def _deserialize_quest(self, snapshot: Dict[str, Any]) -> Quest:
        quest = Quest(
            id=snapshot.get("id", str(uuid.uuid4())),
            title=snapshot.get("title", ""),
            description=snapshot.get("description", ""),
            quest_type=QuestType(snapshot.get("quest_type", "combat")),
            difficulty=Difficulty(snapshot.get("difficulty", 3)),
            min_players=snapshot.get("min_players", 1),
            max_players=snapshot.get("max_players", 4),
            recommended_level=snapshot.get("recommended_level", 1),
            tags=snapshot.get("tags", []),
        )
        for obj_data in snapshot.get("objectives", []):
            quest.objectives.append(Objective(
                description=obj_data.get("desc", ""),
                required=obj_data.get("required", True),
            ))
        for enemy_data in snapshot.get("enemies", []):
            quest.enemies.append(Enemy(
                name=enemy_data.get("name", ""),
                enemy_type=EnemyType(enemy_data.get("type", "minion")),
                health=enemy_data.get("hp", 100),
            ))
        for reward_data in snapshot.get("rewards", []):
            quest.rewards.append(Reward(
                name=reward_data.get("name", ""),
                reward_type=RewardType(reward_data.get("type", "gold")),
                value=reward_data.get("value", 0),
            ))
        return quest


# --- Simulation Engine ---

class SimulationEngine:
    """Simulates quest runs to provide testing data for refinement."""

    def simulate_quest(
        self, quest: Quest, participants: List[Player], iterations: int = 1
    ) -> List[SimulationResult]:
        """Run quest simulation with given participants."""
        results = []
        for _ in range(iterations):
            result = self._run_single_simulation(quest, participants)
            results.append(result)
        return results

    def _run_single_simulation(self, quest: Quest, participants: List[Player]) -> SimulationResult:
        """Simulate a single quest run."""
        total_player_power = sum(
            p.skills.average_skill() * 10 * (1 + p.skills.level * 0.15)
            for p in participants
        )
        total_enemy_power = sum(e.power_rating() for e in quest.enemies)

        difficulty_mult = BalanceEngine.DIFFICULTY_MULTIPLIERS[quest.difficulty]
        adjusted_enemy_power = total_enemy_power * difficulty_mult

        power_ratio = total_player_power / max(adjusted_enemy_power, 1)

        # Determine success probability
        if power_ratio >= 1.5:
            success_prob = 0.95
        elif power_ratio >= 1.0:
            success_prob = 0.7 + (power_ratio - 1.0) * 0.5
        elif power_ratio >= 0.6:
            success_prob = 0.3 + (power_ratio - 0.6) * 1.0
        else:
            success_prob = max(0.05, power_ratio * 0.5)

        success = random.random() < success_prob

        # Simulate combat outcomes
        enemies_defeated = len(quest.enemies) if success else int(len(quest.enemies) * random.uniform(0.2, 0.8))
        player_deaths = 0
        if not success:
            player_deaths = random.randint(1, len(participants))
        elif power_ratio < 1.0:
            player_deaths = random.randint(0, max(0, len(participants) - 1))

        # Objectives completion
        total_obj = len(quest.objectives)
        if success:
            obj_completed = total_obj
        else:
            obj_completed = int(total_obj * random.uniform(0.3, 0.7))

        # Time estimate (minutes)
        base_time = 15 + len(quest.enemies) * 3 + len(quest.objectives) * 5
        time_variation = random.uniform(0.7, 1.4)
        completion_time = base_time * time_variation * difficulty_mult

        # Perceived difficulty
        perceived = min(5.0, max(1.0, adjusted_enemy_power / max(total_player_power, 1) * 3))

        # Balance score (1-10, where 5 is perfectly balanced)
        balance_score = 10.0 - abs(5.0 - perceived * 2) * 2

        rewards_earned = [r.name for r in quest.rewards] if success else []

        return SimulationResult(
            quest_id=quest.id,
            timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
            participants=[p.username for p in participants],
            success=success,
            completion_time=round(completion_time, 1),
            difficulty_perceived=round(perceived, 2),
            player_deaths=player_deaths,
            enemies_defeated=enemies_defeated,
            objectives_completed=obj_completed,
            total_objectives=total_obj,
            rewards_earned=rewards_earned,
            feedback=self._generate_feedback(success, perceived, power_ratio),
            balance_score=round(balance_score, 2),
        )

    def _generate_feedback(self, success: bool, perceived_difficulty: float, power_ratio: float) -> str:
        if not success and perceived_difficulty > 4.0:
            return "Quest is extremely challenging. Consider reducing enemy power or adding healing opportunities."
        elif not success:
            return "Party was defeated. Better coordination or higher levels may be needed."
        elif perceived_difficulty < 1.5:
            return "Quest was trivially easy. Consider increasing difficulty for better engagement."
        elif perceived_difficulty < 2.5:
            return "Quest was comfortable but could use more challenge for veteran players."
        elif perceived_difficulty <= 3.5:
            return "Well-balanced encounter. Players were engaged and challenged appropriately."
        else:
            return "Challenging but achievable. Good difficulty for experienced parties."

    def aggregate_results(self, results: List[SimulationResult]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Aggregate multiple simulation results into summary statistics."""
        if not results:
            return {"error": "No results to aggregate"}

        success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r.success)
        total = len(results)

        return {
            "total_simulations": total,
            "success_rate": round(success_count / total, 3),
            "average_completion_time": round(statistics.mean([r.completion_time for r in results]), 1),
            "average_perceived_difficulty": round(statistics.mean([r.difficulty_perceived for r in results]), 2),
            "average_player_deaths": round(statistics.mean([r.player_deaths for r in results]), 2),
            "average_balance_score": round(statistics.mean([r.balance_score for r in results]), 2),
            "average_objectives_completed": round(
                statistics.mean([r.objectives_completed / max(r.total_objectives, 1) for r in results]), 3
            ),
            "recommendation": self._overall_recommendation(success_count / total),
        }

    def _overall_recommendation(self, success_rate: float) -> str:
        if success_rate < 0.3:
            return "Quest is too difficult for the target audience. Significant rebalancing needed."
        elif success_rate < 0.5:
            return "Quest is challenging. Consider minor difficulty reductions."
        elif success_rate <= 0.75:
            return "Quest difficulty is well-calibrated for the target audience."
        elif success_rate <= 0.9:
            return "Quest is on the easier side. Consider slight difficulty increase."
        else:
            return "Quest may be too easy. Increase enemy power or add complications."


# --- Community Sharing ---

class CommunityHub:
    """Manages quest sharing, rating, and discovery."""

    def __init__(self):
        self.published_quests: Dict[str, Quest] = {}
        self.reviews: Dict[str, List[Review]] = {}

    def publish_quest(self, quest: Quest, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Publish a quest for community access."""
        if not quest.title:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest must have a title"}
        if not quest.objectives:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest must have at least one objective"}

        quest.published = True
        quest.updated_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
        self.published_quests[quest.id] = quest
        self.reviews.setdefault(quest.id, [])

        return {"success": True, "quest_id": quest.id, "message": f"Quest '{quest.title}' published"}

    def unpublish_quest(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Remove a quest from community listing."""
        quest = self.published_quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if quest.created_by != player_id and player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not authorized"}

        quest.published = False
        del self.published_quests[quest_id]
        return {"success": True, "message": "Quest unpublished"}

    def add_review(self, quest_id: str, reviewer_id: str, rating: int, comment: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add a review to a published quest."""
        if quest_id not in self.published_quests:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found or not published"}
        if not 1 <= rating <= 5:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Rating must be between 1 and 5"}

        quest = self.published_quests[quest_id]
        if reviewer_id == quest.created_by:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Cannot review your own quest"}

        review = Review(
            quest_id=quest_id,
            reviewer_id=reviewer_id,
            rating=rating,
            comment=comment,
            timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
        )
        self.reviews.setdefault(quest_id, []).append(review)
        quest.reviews.append(review)
        return {"success": True, "review_id": review.id}

    def get_quest_rating(self, quest_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get average rating and review count for a quest."""
        reviews = self.reviews.get(quest_id, [])
        if not reviews:
            return {"average_rating": 0, "review_count": 0}
        ratings = [r.rating for r in reviews]
        return {
            "average_rating": round(statistics.mean(ratings), 2),
            "review_count": len(reviews),
            "rating_distribution": {i: ratings.count(i) for i in range(1, 6)},
        }

    def search_quests(
        self, quest_type: Optional[QuestType] = None,
        difficulty: Optional[Difficulty] = None,
        min_rating: float = 0.0,
        tags: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Search published quests with filters."""
        results = []
        for quest in self.published_quests.values():
            if quest_type and quest.quest_type != quest_type:
                continue
            if difficulty and quest.difficulty != difficulty:
                continue
            if tags and not any(t in quest.tags for t in tags):
                continue

            rating_info = self.get_quest_rating(quest.id)
            if rating_info["average_rating"] < min_rating:
                continue

            results.append({
                "id": quest.id,
                "title": quest.title,
                "type": quest.quest_type.value,
                "difficulty": quest.difficulty.value,
                "rating": rating_info["average_rating"],
                "reviews": rating_info["review_count"],
                "created_by": quest.created_by,
                "tags": quest.tags,
            })

        results.sort(key=lambda x: x["rating"], reverse=True)
        return results

    def get_top_quests(self, limit: int = 10) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get top-rated quests."""
        return self.search_quests()[:limit]


# --- Collaboration Manager ---

class CollaborationManager:
    """Manages real-time collaboration between players on quest design."""

    def __init__(self):
        self.active_sessions: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {}
        self.edit_locks: Dict[str, str] = {}

    def create_session(self, quest_id: str, creator_id: str) -> str:
        """Create a collaboration session for a quest."""
        session_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        self.active_sessions[session_id] = {
            "quest_id": quest_id,
            "creator": creator_id,
            "participants": [creator_id],
            "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "changes_pending": [],
            "chat_log": [],
        }
        return session_id

    def join_session(self, session_id: str, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Join an existing collaboration session."""
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if not session:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Session not found"}
        if player_id in session["participants"]:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Already in session"}

        session["participants"].append(player_id)
        self._add_chat_message(session_id, "system", f"Player {player_id} joined the session")
        return {"success": True, "session_id": session_id, "participants": session["participants"]}

    def leave_session(self, session_id: str, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Leave a collaboration session."""
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if not session:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Session not found"}
        if player_id not in session["participants"]:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not in session"}

        session["participants"].remove(player_id)
        self._release_locks(player_id)
        self._add_chat_message(session_id, "system", f"Player {player_id} left the session")

        if not session["participants"]:
            del self.active_sessions[session_id]
            return {"success": True, "message": "Session closed (no participants)"}
        return {"success": True, "message": "Left session"}

    def propose_change(self, session_id: str, player_id: str, change: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Propose a change to the quest (for collaborative approval)."""
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if not session:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Session not found"}
        if player_id not in session["participants"]:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not in session"}

        change_entry = {
            "id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
            "proposed_by": player_id,
            "change": change,
            "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            "approvals": [],
            "rejections": [],
            "status": "pending",
        }
        session["changes_pending"].append(change_entry)
        return {"success": True, "change_id": change_entry["id"]}

    def vote_on_change(self, session_id: str, change_id: str, player_id: str, approve: bool) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Vote on a proposed change."""
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if not session:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Session not found"}

        for change in session["changes_pending"]:
            if change["id"] == change_id and change["status"] == "pending":
                if approve:
                    change["approvals"].append(player_id)
                else:
                    change["rejections"].append(player_id)

                total = len(session["participants"])
                if len(change["approvals"]) > total / 2:
                    change["status"] = "approved"
                elif len(change["rejections"]) > total / 2:
                    change["status"] = "rejected"

                return {"success": True, "status": change["status"]}

        return {"success": False, "error": "Change not found or already resolved"}

    def acquire_lock(self, quest_id: str, section: str, player_id: str) -> bool:
        """Acquire an edit lock on a quest section."""
        lock_key = f"{quest_id}:{section}"
        if lock_key in self.edit_locks and self.edit_locks[lock_key] != player_id:
            return False
        self.edit_locks[lock_key] = player_id
        return True

    def release_lock(self, quest_id: str, section: str, player_id: str) -> bool:
        """Release an edit lock."""
        lock_key = f"{quest_id}:{section}"
        if self.edit_locks.get(lock_key) == player_id:
            del self.edit_locks[lock_key]
            return True
        return False

    def _release_locks(self, player_id: str):
        keys_to_remove = [k for k, v in self.edit_locks.items() if v == player_id]
        for key in keys_to_remove:
            del self.edit_locks[key]

    def send_message(self, session_id: str, player_id: str, message: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Send a chat message in the collaboration session."""
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if not session:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Session not found"}
        if player_id not in session["participants"]:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not in session"}

        self._add_chat_message(session_id, player_id, message)
        return {"success": True}

    def _add_chat_message(self, session_id: str, sender: str, message: str):
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if session:
            session["chat_log"].append({
                "sender": sender,
                "message": message,
                "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
            })

    def get_session_info(self, session_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get current session state."""
        session = self.active_sessions.get(session_id)
        if not session:
            return {"error": "Session not found"}
        return {
            "quest_id": session["quest_id"],
            "participants": session["participants"],
            "pending_changes": len([c for c in session["changes_pending"] if c["status"] == "pending"]),
            "chat_messages": len(session["chat_log"]),
        }


# --- Main System ---

class MultiAgentQuestCreator:
    """
    Main system coordinating all subsystems for collaborative quest creation.
    Provides the unified API for players to interact with.
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self.players: Dict[str, Player] = {}
        self.quests: Dict[str, Quest] = {}
        self.balance_engine = BalanceEngine()
        self.history_manager = HistoryManager()
        self.simulation_engine = SimulationEngine()
        self.community_hub = CommunityHub()
        self.collaboration_manager = CollaborationManager()

    # --- Player Management ---

    def register_player(self, username: str, password: str, role: PlayerRole = PlayerRole.DESIGNER) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Register a new player."""
        for p in self.players.values():
            if p.username == username:
                return {"success": False, "error": "Username already taken"}

        player = Player(
            username=username,
            password_hash=self._hash_password(password),
            role=role,
        )
        self.players[player.id] = player
        return {"success": True, "player_id": player.id, "username": username}

    def login(self, username: str, password: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Log in a player."""
        for player in self.players.values():
            if player.username == username:
                if player.password_hash == self._hash_password(password):
                    player.logged_in = True
                    player.session_token = str(uuid.uuid4())
                    return {
                        "success": True,
                        "player_id": player.id,
                        "session_token": player.session_token,
                    }
                return {"success": False, "error": "Invalid password"}
        return {"success": False, "error": "User not found"}

    def logout(self, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Log out a player."""
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        if not player:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Player not found"}
        player.logged_in = False
        player.session_token = ""
        return {"success": True}

    def update_player_skills(self, player_id: str, skills: Dict[str, int]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Update player skill levels."""
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        if not player:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Player not found"}

        if "combat" in skills:
            player.skills.combat = max(1, min(100, skills["combat"]))
        if "puzzle_solving" in skills:
            player.skills.puzzle_solving = max(1, min(100, skills["puzzle_solving"]))
        if "exploration" in skills:
            player.skills.exploration = max(1, min(100, skills["exploration"]))
        if "teamwork" in skills:
            player.skills.teamwork = max(1, min(100, skills["teamwork"]))
        if "level" in skills:
            player.skills.level = max(1, min(100, skills["level"]))

        return {"success": True, "skills": player.skills}

    def set_player_preferences(self, player_id: str, preferences: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Set player preferences for quest balancing."""
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        if not player:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Player not found"}
        player.preferences.update(preferences)
        return {"success": True, "preferences": player.preferences}

    # --- Quest Creation ---

    def create_quest(
        self, player_id: str, title: str, quest_type: QuestType = QuestType.COMBAT,
        difficulty: Difficulty = Difficulty.MEDIUM, description: str = "",
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Create a new quest."""
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        if not player or not player.logged_in:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Player not logged in"}

        quest = Quest(
            title=title,
            description=description,
            quest_type=quest_type,
            difficulty=difficulty,
            created_by=player_id,
            collaborators=[player_id],
            created_at=datetime.now().isoformat(),
            updated_at=datetime.now().isoformat(),
        )
        self.quests[quest.id] = quest
        player.created_quests.append(quest.id)

        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, player.username, "Initial creation")

        return {"success": True, "quest_id": quest.id, "title": title}

    def add_collaborator(self, quest_id: str, owner_id: str, collaborator_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add a collaborator to a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if quest.created_by != owner_id and owner_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not authorized"}
        if collaborator_id in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Already a collaborator"}

        collaborator = self.players.get(collaborator_id)
        if not collaborator:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Collaborator not found"}

        quest.collaborators.append(collaborator_id)
        return {"success": True, "collaborators": quest.collaborators}

    def add_objective(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, description: str,
                      required: bool = True, difficulty_contribution: float = 1.0) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add an objective to a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        objective = Objective(
            description=description,
            required=required,
            difficulty_contribution=difficulty_contribution,
            order=len(quest.objectives),
        )
        quest.objectives.append(objective)

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Added objective: {description}")

        return {"success": True, "objective_id": objective.id}

    def add_enemy(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, name: str,
                  enemy_type: EnemyType = EnemyType.MINION,
                  health: int = 100, attack: int = 10, defense: int = 5,
                  special_abilities: Optional[List[str]] = None, level: int = 1) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add an enemy to a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        enemy = Enemy(
            name=name,
            enemy_type=enemy_type,
            health=health,
            attack=attack,
            defense=defense,
            special_abilities=special_abilities or [],
            level=level,
        )
        quest.enemies.append(enemy)

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Added enemy: {name}")

        return {"success": True, "enemy_id": enemy.id}

    def add_reward(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, name: str,
                   reward_type: RewardType = RewardType.GOLD,
                   value: int = 100, rarity: int = 1, description: str = "") -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add a reward to a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        reward = Reward(
            name=name,
            reward_type=reward_type,
            value=value,
            rarity=rarity,
            description=description,
        )
        quest.rewards.append(reward)

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Added reward: {name}")

        return {"success": True, "reward_id": reward.id}

    def add_npc(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, name: str,
                role: str = "quest_giver", dialogue: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add a custom NPC to a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        npc = NPC(name=name, role=role, dialogue=dialogue or [], created_by=player_id)
        quest.npcs.append(npc)

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Added NPC: {name}")

        return {"success": True, "npc_id": npc.id}

    def add_custom_item(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, name: str,
                        description: str = "", stats: Optional[Dict[str, int]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Add a custom item to a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        item = CustomItem(name=name, description=description, stats=stats or {}, created_by=player_id)
        quest.custom_items.append(item)

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Added custom item: {name}")

        return {"success": True, "item_id": item.id}

    def modify_quest(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, **kwargs) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Modify quest properties."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        changes = []
        if "title" in kwargs:
            quest.title = kwargs["title"]
            changes.append("title")
        if "description" in kwargs:
            quest.description = kwargs["description"]
            changes.append("description")
        if "quest_type" in kwargs:
            quest.quest_type = kwargs["quest_type"]
            changes.append("quest_type")
        if "difficulty" in kwargs:
            quest.difficulty = kwargs["difficulty"]
            changes.append("difficulty")
        if "min_players" in kwargs:
            quest.min_players = kwargs["min_players"]
            changes.append("min_players")
        if "max_players" in kwargs:
            quest.max_players = kwargs["max_players"]
            changes.append("max_players")
        if "recommended_level" in kwargs:
            quest.recommended_level = kwargs["recommended_level"]
            changes.append("recommended_level")
        if "tags" in kwargs:
            quest.tags = kwargs["tags"]
            changes.append("tags")

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Modified: {', '.join(changes)}")

        return {"success": True, "modified": changes}

    def remove_enemy(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, enemy_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Remove an enemy from a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        quest.enemies = [e for e in quest.enemies if e.id != enemy_id]
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Removed enemy: {enemy_id}")
        return {"success": True}

    def remove_objective(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, objective_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Remove an objective from a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        quest.objectives = [o for o in quest.objectives if o.id != objective_id]
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Removed objective: {objective_id}")
        return {"success": True}

    # --- Balance and Feedback ---

    def get_balance_feedback(self, quest_id: str, player_ids: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get real-time balance feedback for a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"error": "Quest not found"}

        player_skills = []
        ids = player_ids or quest.collaborators
        for pid in ids:
            player = self.players.get(pid)
            if player:
                player_skills.append(player.skills)

        return self.balance_engine.analyze_balance(quest, player_skills)

    def get_adjustment_suggestions(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get suggestions based on player preferences."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return [{"error": "Quest not found"}]

        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        if not player:
            return [{"error": "Player not found"}]

        return self.balance_engine.suggest_adjustments(quest, player.preferences)

    def apply_suggestion(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, suggestion: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Apply a balance suggestion to the quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        applied = False
        if suggestion.get("type") == "difficulty":
            new_diff = suggestion.get("suggested")
            if new_diff:
                quest.difficulty = Difficulty(new_diff)
                applied = True
        elif suggestion.get("type") == "enemy_count":
            target_count = suggestion.get("suggested", len(quest.enemies))
            current = len(quest.enemies)
            if target_count > current:
                for _ in range(target_count - current):
                    quest.enemies.append(Enemy(name=f"Enemy_{len(quest.enemies)+1}"))
            elif target_count < current:
                quest.enemies = quest.enemies[:target_count]
            applied = True
        elif suggestion.get("type") == "rewards":
            multiplier = suggestion.get("suggested_multiplier", 1.0)
            for reward in quest.rewards:
                reward.value = int(reward.value * multiplier)
            applied = True

        if applied:
            player = self.players.get(player_id)
            username = player.username if player else player_id
            self.history_manager.save_version(quest, username, f"Applied suggestion: {suggestion.get('type')}")

        return {"success": applied, "suggestion_type": suggestion.get("type")}

    # --- History ---

    def get_quest_history(self, quest_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get version history for a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return [{"error": "Quest not found"}]
        return self.history_manager.get_history(quest)

    def revert_quest(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str, version_number: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Revert a quest to a previous version."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        restored = self.history_manager.revert_to_version(quest, version_number)
        if not restored:
            return {"success": False, "error": f"Version {version_number} not found"}

        self.quests[quest_id] = restored
        player = self.players.get(player_id)
        username = player.username if player else player_id
        self.history_manager.save_version(restored, username, f"Reverted to version {version_number}")

        return {"success": True, "reverted_to": version_number}

    def compare_versions(self, quest_id: str, version_a: int, version_b: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Compare two quest versions."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"error": "Quest not found"}
        return self.history_manager.get_diff(quest, version_a, version_b)

    # --- Simulation / Testing ---

    def simulate_quest(self, quest_id: str, player_ids: List[str], iterations: int = 5) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Simulate a quest run for testing."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"error": "Quest not found"}

        participants = [self.players[pid] for pid in player_ids if pid in self.players]
        if not participants:
            return {"error": "No valid participants"}

        results = self.simulation_engine.simulate_quest(quest, participants, iterations)
        summary = self.simulation_engine.aggregate_results(results)
        summary["individual_results"] = [
            {
                "success": r.success,
                "time": r.completion_time,
                "deaths": r.player_deaths,
                "balance_score": r.balance_score,
                "feedback": r.feedback,
            }
            for r in results
        ]
        return summary

    # --- Community ---

    def publish_quest(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Publish a quest to the community."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if quest.created_by != player_id and player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not authorized"}
        return self.community_hub.publish_quest(quest, player_id)

    def review_quest(self, quest_id: str, reviewer_id: str, rating: int, comment: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Review a published quest."""
        return self.community_hub.add_review(quest_id, reviewer_id, rating, comment)

    def search_community_quests(self, **filters) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Search community quests."""
        quest_type = filters.get("quest_type")
        difficulty = filters.get("difficulty")
        min_rating = filters.get("min_rating", 0.0)
        tags = filters.get("tags")
        return self.community_hub.search_quests(quest_type, difficulty, min_rating, tags)

    def get_quest_reviews(self, quest_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get reviews for a quest."""
        return self.community_hub.get_quest_rating(quest_id)

    # --- Collaboration ---

    def start_collaboration(self, quest_id: str, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Start a collaboration session on a quest."""
        quest = self.quests.get(quest_id)
        if not quest:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Quest not found"}
        if player_id not in quest.collaborators:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Not a collaborator"}

        session_id = self.collaboration_manager.create_session(quest_id, player_id)
        return {"success": True, "session_id": session_id}

    def join_collaboration(self, session_id: str, player_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Join a collaboration session."""
        return self.collaboration_manager.join_session(session_id, player_id)

    def propose_quest_change(self, session_id: str, player_id: str, change: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Propose a change during collaboration."""
        return self.collaboration_manager.propose_change(session_id, player_id, change)

    def vote_change(self, session_id: str, change_id: str, player_id: str, approve: bool) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Vote on a proposed change."""
        return self.collaboration_manager.vote_on_change(session_id, change_id, player_id, approve)

    def send_collaboration_message(self, session_id: str, player_id: str, message: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Send a chat message in collaboration session."""
        return self.collaboration_manager.send_message(session_id, player_id, message)

    # --- Utility ---

    def get_quest(self, quest_id: str) -> Optional[Quest]:
        """Get a quest by ID."""
        return self.quests.get(quest_id)

    def get_player(self, player_id: str) -> Optional[Player]:
        """Get a player by ID."""
        return self.players.get(player_id)

    def list_player_quests(self, player_id: str) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """List all quests a player is involved in."""
        results = []
        for quest in self.quests.values():
            if player_id in quest.collaborators:
                results.append({
                    "id": quest.id,
                    "title": quest.title,
                    "type": quest.quest_type.value,
                    "difficulty": quest.difficulty.value,
                    "role": "creator" if quest.created_by == player_id else "collaborator",
                    "version": quest.current_version,
                })
        return results

    @staticmethod
    def _hash_password(password: str) -> str:
        """Simple password hashing (use bcrypt in production)."""
        import hashlib
        return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()


# --- Demo / Test Harness ---

def run_demo():
    """Demonstrate the Multi-Agent Quest Creator system."""
    system = MultiAgentQuestCreator()

    # Register players
    p1 = system.register_player("warrior_king", "pass123", PlayerRole.DESIGNER)
    p2 = system.register_player("puzzle_master", "pass456", PlayerRole.BALANCER)
    p3 = system.register_player("explorer_joe", "pass789", PlayerRole.TESTER)

    player1_id = p1["player_id"]
    player2_id = p2["player_id"]
    player3_id = p3["player_id"]

    # Login
    system.login("warrior_king", "pass123")
    system.login("puzzle_master", "pass456")
    system.login("explorer_joe", "pass789")

    # Set skills
    system.update_player_skills(player1_id, {"combat": 8, "level": 5})
    system.update_player_skills(player2_id, {"puzzle_solving": 9, "level": 4})
    system.update_player_skills(player3_id, {"exploration": 8, "level": 3})

    # Set preferences
    system.set_player_preferences(player1_id, {
        "preferred_difficulty": 4,
        "preferred_enemy_count": 5,
        "preferred_enemy_types": ["elite", "boss"],
    })

    # Create quest
    quest_result = system.create_quest(
        player1_id, "Dragon's Lair Assault",
        QuestType.COMBAT, Difficulty.HARD,
        "Infiltrate the dragon's lair and defeat the ancient wyrm."
    )
    quest_id = quest_result["quest_id"]
    print(f"Created quest: {quest_result}")

    # Add collaborators
    system.add_collaborator(quest_id, player1_id, player2_id)
    system.add_collaborator(quest_id, player1_id, player3_id)

    # Add objectives
    system.add_objective(quest_id, player1_id, "Navigate through the trapped entrance", difficulty_contribution=1.5)
    system.add_objective(quest_id, player2_id, "Solve the ancient door puzzle", difficulty_contribution=2.0)
    system.add_objective(quest_id, player1_id, "Defeat the Dragon King", difficulty_contribution=3.0)

    # Add enemies
    system.add_enemy(quest_id, player1_id, "Kobold Guard", EnemyType.MINION, 50, 8, 3, ["ambush"], 2)
    system.add_enemy(quest_id, player1_id, "Kobold Guard", EnemyType.MINION, 50, 8, 3, [], 2)
    system.add_enemy(quest_id, player1_id, "Drake Sentinel", EnemyType.ELITE, 200, 20, 15, ["fire_breath", "tail_sweep"], 5)
    system.add_enemy(quest_id, player1_id, "Dragon King", EnemyType.BOSS, 500, 35, 25, ["inferno", "wing_gust", "terror_roar"], 8)

    # Add rewards
    system.add_reward(quest_id, player2_id, "Dragon Scale Armor", RewardType.ITEM, 500, 4, "Legendary armor")
    system.add_reward(quest_id, player2_id, "Hoard Gold", RewardType.GOLD, 1000, 2)
    system.add_reward(quest_id, player2_id, "Dragon Slayer Title", RewardType.UNIQUE, 200, 5, "Unique title")

    # Add NPC
    system.add_npc(quest_id, player3_id, "Old Sage Morin", "quest_giver", [
        "The dragon has terrorized our village for decades.",
        "Find the secret entrance through the mountain pass.",
        "May the gods protect you, brave adventurers.",
    ])

    # Add custom item
    system.add_custom_item(quest_id, player3_id, "Dragon Bane Sword", "A blade forged to slay dragons", {"attack": 15, "dragon_damage": 30})

    # Get balance feedback
    print("\n--- Balance Feedback ---")
    feedback = system.get_balance_feedback(quest_id, [player1_id, player2_id, player3_id])
    print(f"Balance ratio: {feedback['balance_ratio']}")
    print(f"Verdict: {feedback['verdict']}")
    print(f"Is balanced: {feedback['is_balanced']}")
    for suggestion in feedback['suggestions']:
        print(f"  Suggestion: {suggestion}")

    # Get adjustment suggestions based on preferences
    print("\n--- Preference-Based Suggestions ---")
    adjustments = system.get_adjustment_suggestions(quest_id, player1_id)
    for adj in adjustments:
        print(f"  {adj['type']}: {adj['reason']}")

    # Simulate quest
    print("\n--- Simulation Results ---")
    sim_results = system.simulate_quest(quest_id, [player1_id, player2_id, player3_id], iterations=10)
    print(f"Success rate: {sim_results['success_rate']}")
    print(f"Average time: {sim_results['average_completion_time']} minutes")
    print(f"Average balance score: {sim_results['average_balance_score']}/10")
    print(f"Recommendation: {sim_results['recommendation']}")

    # View history
    print("\n--- Quest History ---")
    history = system.get_quest_history(quest_id)
    for entry in history[:5]:
        print(f"  v{entry['version']}: {entry['description']} (by {entry['modified_by']})")

    # Revert example
    system.revert_quest(quest_id, player1_id, 2)
    print("\nReverted to version 2")

    # Collaboration
    print("\n--- Collaboration ---")
    session = system.start_collaboration(quest_id, player1_id)
    session_id = session["session_id"]
    system.join_collaboration(session_id, player2_id)
    system.join_collaboration(session_id, player3_id)

    change = system.propose_quest_change(session_id, player2_id, {
        "field": "difficulty",
        "from": "hard",
        "to": "extreme",
        "reason": "Players are too strong for hard mode",
    })
    change_id = change["change_id"]
    system.vote_change(session_id, change_id, player1_id, True)
    vote_result = system.vote_change(session_id, change_id, player3_id, True)
    print(f"Change vote result: {vote_result}")

    system.send_collaboration_message(session_id, player1_id, "Great teamwork everyone!")

    # Publish and review
    print("\n--- Community ---")

    # Restore quest for publishing (revert removed objectives)
    quest = system.get_quest(quest_id)
    if not quest.objectives:
        system.add_objective(quest_id, player1_id, "Defeat the Dragon King")
    if not quest.title:
        system.modify_quest(quest_id, player1_id, title="Dragon's Lair Assault")

    pub_result = system.publish_quest(quest_id, player1_id)
    print(f"Published: {pub_result}")

    # Create another player for reviewing
    p4 = system.register_player("critic_sam", "pass000", PlayerRole.REVIEWER)
    player4_id = p4["player_id"]
    system.login("critic_sam", "pass000")

    system.review_quest(quest_id, player4_id, 4, "Great combat design, could use more exploration elements.")
    ratings = system.get_quest_reviews(quest_id)
    print(f"Quest rating: {ratings}")

    # Search community
    results = system.search_community_quests(quest_type=QuestType.COMBAT)
    print(f"Community search found {len(results)} quest(s)")

    print("\n--- Demo Complete ---")
    return system


if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_demo()
